source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
A belt can be joined together in 5 different ways.
<image1>
How many $\mathrm{cm}$ is the belt longer if it is only closed in the first hole instead of in all 5 holes?
<image2>
extraction_notes: answer letter B mapped to option text

image_dependency: requires_image=true and text_dominant=false suggest the visual is central rather than optional
The question refers to a belt being closed in different holes; the needed spacing information is not stated in the text
asset_registry_record.image_manifest shows an available image and registry_passed=true
multi_step: Solving likely requires combining the count of usable holes with the distance between holes shown in the image
The comparison 'first hole' versus 'all 5 holes' implies reasoning over multiple positions rather than reading off a single value
This is more than one-step retrieval, but the final computation appears short once the visual spacing is known
verifiability: answer_type is short_text and the provided answer is a single numeric length with unit
Multiple-choice options are provided, which makes downstream checking straightforward
answer_present=true and registry_passed=true support reliable answer availability

risk_flags: critical measurement details are not explicit in the text

decision_reasons: 资产完整：题干、答案和主图像均存在，且 registry_passed=true、issues 为空
初步评分较高：image_dependency_score=0.88、verifiability_score=0.9、multi_step_score=0.62，具备较好的候选价值
虽然题干未显式给出关键测量细节，但该样本本身包含可用图像，核心语义仍可由图文联合恢复
风险主要是对评分阶段不可见图像内容的提示，并非资产缺失或核心语义不足，因此不应降为 reject
